creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Can someone please erase the bullshit I sent as PR?

I realized (too late), that the lib version problem is only on FreeBSD 
10.0-CURRENT, although I prepend all build with setenv UNAME_r 
"9.9-CURRENT".
I guess the issue is due to the version 10.0-problem reported earlier. I 
tested again on FreeBSD 9.0-BETA3 and mpfr is installing libmpfr.so.4 on 
those machines (mpfr-3.1.0). It is definitely installing libmpfr.so.5 on 
my FBSD 10.0 boxes.

Sorry for the trouble.

Oliver
